# Amplified Solutions

> Amplified Solutions automates real estate operations for less than a VA costs. Founded in 2018 by Joey Ahern, we've worked with 500+ teams across North America. We embed with teams as a fractional technology partner — finding what's manual and building systems that run automatically. Reporting, follow-up, transaction coordination, CRM setup, content, data cleanup — if someone on the team is doing it by hand, we automate it.

## What we do

Amplified Solutions is a fractional CTO and automation partner for real estate teams. We don't do one project and leave. We stay embedded, continuously identifying and automating manual workflows. Our clients pay a monthly fee — less than a VA costs — and get an ongoing technology partner who keeps building until there's nothing left to do by hand.

Common automations we build:
- **Automated reporting and dashboards**: Agent scorecards, leadership dashboards, activity reports that update themselves.
- **Transaction coordination workflows**: Contract auto-fill, forms that push into deals and CRM, automated notifications.
- **Follow-up and nurture systems**: Automated sequences, database reactivation, personalized outreach based on pipeline stage.
- **CRM setup and optimization**: Follow Up Boss buildouts with smart lists, action plans, lead flows, stages, and workflows.
- **Content and SEO systems**: Blog posts, neighborhood guides, and market updates structured for Google and AI citations.
- **Custom automations**: Any manual process that should be a system.

## Who we serve

Real estate teams, brokerages, and team leaders who are paying people to do work that should be automated. Our clients typically have 5-50+ agents and are using Follow Up Boss as their CRM.

## About the founder

Joey Ahern spent 8 years working inside 500+ real estate teams. Every team had the same problem — manual operations that should have been automated. That's why he built Amplified Solutions.

## Related products

- **Trevy AI** (https://trevy.io): An AI agent that integrates with Follow Up Boss for automated lead nurture, market data, and CRM operations.
